title: Vịt Quay

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: Follow Maclam's Kitchen roast duck recipe on YouTube
Mẹ Thịnh's adjustments: use 2 spoons ngũ vị hương instead of 3

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Follow the Maclam's Kitchen roast duck video for the full method.
Use 2 spoons of ngũ vị hương (five-spice) instead of 3.

tip: Mẹ Thịnh built on Maclam's Kitchen method and made it her own with these small adjustments.
